results.title: Remember 'Ramayana: The Legend of Prince Rama'? Here's Where You Can Watch It Now
results.description: The Indo-Japanese animated film, Ramayana: The Legend of Prince Rama, has long been regarded as one of the finest adaptations of the Hindu epic.

results.title: E20 petrol may cut mileage by 3-5% in some vehicles, but benefits outweigh impact: Oil Ministry
results.description: The government acknowledges E20 fuel's minor fuel economy reduction. This impact is outweighed by benefits like better engine performance and lower emissions. India's ethanol blending program began with pilot projects in 2001. The nation achieved ten percent blending ahead of schedule in 2022.

results.title: AIS vs Broker Statement: What taxpayers should verify before filing ITR for AY 2026-27
results.description: AIS covers shares and mutual funds transactions, but taxpayers should confirm the details with broker statements before filing ITR for AY 2026-27. The Annual Information Statement (AIS) is an important document for taxpayers as it provides a consolidated view of tax-related information, including tax payments, TDS, TCS, and income from various sources. However, taxpayers should [...] The post AIS vs Broker Statement: What taxpayers should verify before filing ITR for AY 2026-27 first appeared on informalnewz .

results.title: Sensex Surges Over 690 Points, Nifty Tops 24,150 on IT Rally
results.description: Benchmark indices opened sharply higher as TCS's strong June-quarter earnings and upbeat demand outlook lifted IT stocks, supported by positive global market trends.

results.title: Special Story: BSNL Launches Satellite Phone That Works Without Mobile Network, Priced at ₹1.34 Lakh
results.description: #ଟ ାୱାର_ଟେନସନ_ଗଲା #ଯ େଉଁଠି_ଥିଲେ_ବି_ଲାଗିବ_ଫୋନ BSNL ଆଣିଲା ଦମଦାର ଫେନ୍ । ବିନା ନେଟୱର୍କରେ ଚାଲିବ ମୋବାଇଲ୍ । ଅପହଞ୍ଚ ଉଲାକାରେ ବି ହେବନି କୌଣସି ଅସୁବିଧା । ଭାରତରେ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାକୁ ଆହୁରି ସୁଦୃଢ଼ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସରକାରୀ ଟେଲିକମ୍ କମ୍ପାନୀ BSNL ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ସାଟେଲାଇଟ୍ ଫୋନ୍ ଲଞ୍ଚ କରିଛି । BSNL has launched a new Satellite Phone in India to ensure communication even in areas without mobile network coverage. Unlike conventional smartphones, the handset connects directly to satellites instead of cellular towers, making it suitable for remote locations and emergency situations. results.title: Second Land Restoration Application Barred by Constructive Res Judicata and Limitation Under Chhotanagpur Tenancy Act: Jharkhand High Court
results.description: The High Court of Jharkhand has ruled that subsequent land restoration proceedings under the Chhotanagpur Tenancy Act are barred by the principles of constructive res judicata and limitation if an earlier order on the same dispute has attained finality. Presided over by Justice Sanjay Kumar Dwivedi, the court allowed a 2009 writ petition, setting aside [...]
